emailVerification.heading: Hi, {name}!
emailVerification.paragraphMain: Thank you for registering! We are happy to welcome you to our community. Please click the button below to confirm your email and complete your registration.
emailVerification.paragraphDescription: This link is valid for 3 hours. If you haven't created an account, simply ignore this email.
emailVerification.footer: If the button doesn't work, copy this link into your browser:
